product.name: Premium Non-Slip Yoga Mat 6mm Thick
product.description: Extra-thick 6mm cushioning for joint support. Non-slip texture on both sides. Eco-friendly TPE material, sweat-resistant and easy to clean. Includes carry strap.

related.name: Ultrasonic Aromatherapy Essential Oil Diffuser
related.description: 400ml capacity runs up to 8 hours. 7 LED colour options and 4 timer settings. BPA-free, whisper-quiet ultrasonic technology. Auto shut-off when water runs out.

related.name: Blue Light Blocking Computer Glasses
related.description: Reduces digital eye strain from screens. UV400 protection. Lightweight TR90 frame. Suitable for men and women. Anti-reflective coating for clearer vision in artificial lighting.

related.name: Scented Soy Candle Gift Set — 3 Pack
related.description: Hand-poured in the UK. Three fragrances: Lavender & Vanilla, Cedarwood & Amber, Fresh Linen. 40-hour burn time each. Cotton wicks, no soot. Perfect gift set.
